sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4364" key="a)llakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλακ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n4364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must change</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.53b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
